The Spot Stretch Therapy

The Spot is an inclusive movement studio - for all genders, body types, and abilities - offering 1:1 Stretch Therapy sessions.

These sessions are performed by a Level 1-certified Fascial Stretch Therapy Practitioner. This therapy increases mobility & flexibility, posture, muscular balance, and circulation. And it reduces pain, tightness, and risk of injury.

Sessions are $80 plus tax. No direct billing.

Please email if you have any questions.

Book Your Stretch Session
